div1.entryFree: Excite, to rouse, stir up: the push and enmity of those this quarrel would e. Troil. II, 2, 138. With to == to impel: every reason --s to this, that my lady loves me, Tw. II, 5, 178. what --s your most worshipful thought to think so? H4B II, 2, 64 (O. Edd. accites). to the grim alarm, Mcb. V, 2, 5. --d me to treason, Cymb. V, 5, 345.
